heading: Requirement of submission of application
label: 300n–2 Requirement of submission of application
text: The Secretary may not make a grant under unless an application for the grant is submitted to the Secretary, the application contains the description of intended uses required in , and the application is in such form, is made in such manner, and contains such agreements, assurances, and information as the Secretary determines to be necessary to carry out this subchapter.section 300k of this titlesection 300n–1 of this title
notes: Prior ProvisionsA prior section 300n–2, , as added , , , provided for technical assistance to health systems agencies and State agencies, prior to repeal by , , , effective .act July 1, 1944, ch. 373, title XV, § 1533Pub.
